opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg ulcer is weeping right through the bandages, it smells terrible, and the throbbing pain gets worse when I stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My long-standing leg ulcer has suddenly got very painful, smelly and is weeping heavily.

symptom_narrative.onset: a shallow ankle ulcer for ~3 months; acute change over 48h
symptom_narrative.character: shallow ankle ulcer, now heavy smelly discharge and new sharp throbbing pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe throbbing pain, worse standing; can't sleep
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: inner ankle bone (medial) of the right leg
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: dull ache relieved by elevation before; now sharp throbbing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: thick smelly discharge soaking dressings; new redness/heat around the ulcer; brown staining and hardened skin on the lower leg; no fever/chills
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: reduced mobility from heaviness/pain; lives alone

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: chronic leg vein problems with brown staining and hardened skin; a long-standing ankle ulcer

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: compression stockings (not worn for a week due to hot weather)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: stopped compression stockings for a week in hot weather

communication_style.typical_message_style: in pain, focused on the smelly weeping wound

objective_data_offered.value: a shallow 4-5cm ulcer over the inner ankle with thick smelly yellow slough and a new ~3cm rim of tender red, warm skin around it; the lower leg is brown-stained and hardened; some ankle swelling
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate pulses/depth or assess for deep infection
